title: VP Revenue Operations
review_text: Pricing increased again this quarter, and our RevOps team is comparing HubSpot with Salesforce and Zoho before renewal.

title: Director of Growth
transcript: The team spends too much time reconciling campaign handoffs manually. They want automation that keeps follow-up sequences tied to real buyer signals.

subject: Reporting export blocked before renewal
message: The operations team cannot export campaign attribution data and is asking whether Salesforce or HubSpot would make renewal reporting easier.
